global_context: Improve week-by-week study content with low cognitive load and bibliography alignment.
constraints: Do not invent references; keep outputs concise and structured.

tasks.title: Design weeks 1-2 learning flow
tasks.objective: Create a coherent weekly flow with objectives, core concepts, and formative checks.
done_definition: Learning objectives are explicit and measurable.
Each week includes one guided activity and one formative check.
Bibliography references remain consistent with project files.

tasks.title: Implement content updates for weeks 3-4
tasks.objective: Apply the designed structure into existing materials and maintain folder conventions.
done_definition: Updated content remains aligned to bibliography.
Week outputs are concise and actionable.

tasks.title: Polish and simplify weeks 5-6
tasks.objective: Reduce overload and improve clarity for student-facing material.
